source_draft: Eastvale Wave-A draft (superseded; audit trail in fixtures/kitchen-sink-violations.SOURCE_NOTES.md)
description: Kitchen-sink profile: ~17 LS Style Manual violations across Phase-1 rules and neighbor coverage, each in a different paragraph. Derived from the clean Eastvale demurrer (Wave-A + Wave-B verified). One planned violation (LS-FN-05) was skipped because the source draft has no pseudo-footnotes.

violations.description: Single space between the end of one citation sentence and the start of the next sentence (was two).
violations.verification_hint: Grep paragraph 43 for '318.) The District' (one space); the clean draft has two spaces.

violations.snippet_before: should be sustained.  Because no amendment could
violations.snippet_after: should be sustained. Because no amendment could
violations.verification_hint: Grep paragraph 65 for 'sustained. Because' (one space); clean draft has two.

violations.snippet_before: rest on the same flawed premise:  that verbal
violations.snippet_after: rest on the same flawed premise: that verbal
violations.description: Single space after a body-prose colon introducing a clause (was two).
violations.verification_hint: Grep paragraph 39 for 'premise: that' (one space after colon); rule requires two spaces after colon in running prose.

violations.snippet_before: no such officer, no such authorization, and no such consent
violations.snippet_after: no such officer, no such authorization and no such consent
violations.description: Oxford comma dropped in three-item list ('officer, authorization[,] and consent').
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 74 has 'no such officer, no such authorization and no such consent' — missing Oxford comma before 'and'.

violations.snippet_before: The rule originated in Reams v. Cooley (1915) 171 Cal. 150
violations.snippet_after: The rule originated in Reams v. Cooley, et al. (1915) 171 Cal. 150
violations.description: 'et al.' preceded by a comma ('Reams v. Cooley, et al.'); LS forbids the comma-preceded form.
violations.verification_hint: Grep for ', et al.' (comma-space-et-al) in paragraph 78; the rule requires 'et al.' without a preceding comma.

violations.description: Closing period placed outside the closing quotation mark ('meruit”.'); LS puts period inside.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 80 contains 'quantum meruit”.' (period after close-quote); clean form is 'quantum meruit.”'.

violations.snippet_before: authorized by District personnel” and “refusing to process
violations.snippet_after: authorized by District personnel;” and “refusing to process
violations.description: Semicolon placed inside the closing quotation mark (';”'); LS places colons and semicolons outside.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 60 contains 'personnel;”' (semicolon before close-quote); clean form would be 'personnel”;' or no semicolon at all.

violations.snippet_before: Public Contract Code section 20118.4 governs change orders
violations.snippet_after: Public Contract Code § 20118.4 governs change orders
violations.description: Section symbol '§' used in body text outside parentheses; LS requires 'section' spelled out outside parens.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 69 begins 'Public Contract Code § 20118.4 governs'; the § is not inside a parenthetical citation.

violations.snippet_before: Under section 430.10, a party may demur on the ground
violations.snippet_after: Under section 430.10, subd. (e), a party may demur on the ground
violations.description: Abbreviation 'subd.' used outside parentheses; LS requires 'subdivision' spelled out outside parens.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 55 contains 'Under section 430.10, subd. (e), a party may demur' — the 'subd.' token is in running prose, not a parenthetical citation.

violations.snippet_before: no authority to bind the district.  (Id.)
violations.snippet_after: no authority to bind the district.  (Ibid.)
violations.description: 'Ibid.' used as a citation sentence; LS forbids 'ibid.' / 'Ibid.' entirely.
violations.verification_hint: Grep the document for 'Ibid' — it should appear exactly once, in paragraph 70, as '(Ibid.)'.

violations.description: 'et seq.' preceded by a comma (', et seq.'); LS forbids the comma-preceded form.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 81 contains ', et seq.)' (comma before 'et seq.'); clean form is ' et seq.' (no preceding comma).

violations.description: Superscript applied to '4th' in '2 Cal.4th 962'; LS forbids superscript on ordinal reporter tokens. Visually identical in extracted text; detectable only via XML <w:vertAlign w:val="superscript"/>.
violations.verification_hint: Inspect word/document.xml for '<w:vertAlign w:val="superscript"/>' — exactly one occurrence, on the '4th' run in the Aubry first-cite in paragraph 53.

violations.snippet_before: First Street Plaza Partners, 65 Cal.App.4th at pp. 668-669
violations.snippet_after: First Street Plaza Partners, supra, 65 Cal.App.4th at pp. 668-669
violations.description: 'supra' inserted into a case short cite; LS short-cite form omits 'supra'.
violations.verification_hint: Grep for 'supra' — exactly one occurrence, in paragraph 79's 'First Street Plaza Partners, supra, 65 Cal.App.4th' short cite.

violations.description: Italics removed from 'Id.' in '(Id. at pp. 349-350.)'; LS requires 'id.' (including the period) italicized.
violations.verification_hint: Inspect paragraph 63 runs; the 'Id.' run immediately after '(' should carry italic=False (no <w:i/> in rPr). The surrounding 'Guz' and 'Id. at pp.' flow text should be unchanged. Contrast: paragraph 61's 'Id.' is still italic.

violations.snippet_before: the District respectfully requests that the Court sustain
violations.snippet_after: the district respectfully requests that the Court sustain
violations.description: Defined-term 'District' incorrectly lowercased ('the district') where the reference is plainly to the named defendant client.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 40 reads 'the district respectfully requests'; elsewhere in the draft (including paragraph 85) the identical construction uses capitalized 'District'.

violations.snippet_before: every contract to which a California school district is a party
violations.snippet_after: every contract to which a California school District is a party
violations.description: Generic 'school district' incorrectly capitalized ('school District') where the reference is plainly generic (abstract California public agencies).
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 38 contains 'a California school District is a party' — 'District' should be lowercase in this generic reference; compare paragraph 39's 'a school district' (clean).

violations.snippet_before: Public Contract Code section 20118.4 requires change orders
violations.snippet_after: Public Contract Code Section 20118.4 requires change orders
violations.description: 'Section' capitalized mid-sentence; LS requires lowercase 'section' in body text except at sentence start or in headings.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 68 contains 'Public Contract Code Section 20118.4 requires' mid-sentence. Contrast: paragraph 70's 'Section 17604 provides' is at sentence start (correctly capitalized).

violations.snippet_before: City of Long Beach v. Mansell (1970) 3 Cal.3d 462, 493
violations.snippet_after: City of Long Beach v. Mansell (1970) 3 Cal.3d 462, 439
violations.description: Digits transposed in pin-cite: correct 493 -> planted 439. Case name and year remain correct; pin-cite no longer resolves to the cited proposition on CourtListener.
violations.verification_hint: Paragraph 72's Mansell cite reads '3 Cal.3d 462, 439'; the seed-verified cite is '3 Cal.3d 462, 493'. Volume/year match; the pin-cite is fabricated.

violations.snippet_before: foreclosed against public entities in California for more than a century.
violations.snippet_after: foreclosed against public entities in California for more than a century.  (See Lakeside School Dist. v. Coastal Builders, Inc. (2014) 229 Cal.App.4th 517, 523-524.)
violations.description: Wholly fabricated case citation added as a see-cite. 'Lakeside School Dist. v. Coastal Builders, Inc.' is not on fixtures/seed-citations.verified.md and does not exist on CourtListener.
violations.verification_hint: Grep for 'Lakeside School Dist.' — exactly one occurrence, in paragraph 77; cross-reference against seed-citations.verified.md (not present). The case name, volume, page, and year are all fabricated.
